---
title: "Differential Geometry and Tensor Analysis for Physical Modeling"
subtitle: "CORE-013 | Core Mathematics — Year 2"
description: "The geometric language of modern physics, continuum mechanics, and geometric methods in statistics and machine learning. Manifolds, tensors, and differential forms provide the coordinate-free framework for models on curved or constrained domains."
date: "2026-04-11"
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
number-sections: true
---

# Differential Geometry and Tensor Analysis for Physical Modeling

*Content not yet generated.*

Run the generation pipeline and then `src/quarto_export.jl` to populate this page.
